items.name: Password-Valedation
items.description: A friendly C++ project that demonstrates password validation. The program checks if a password meets basic security rules (length, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special character, no spaces) and confirms it by re-entering.   Useful for learning classes, input handling, and validation logic in C++.

items.name: Username-Valedation
items.description: A C++ project that validates user names. It checks that the input is not empty, contains only letters and spaces, and is not just spaces.   This project is designed to practice input handling, validation, and class usage in C++.ducational example for learning input handling, validation, and class usage in C++.
